goal: Build a recirculation-overflow conveyor station: cubes arrive on a main belt; a Franka at the pick station picks cubes within a sensor window. Cubes that miss the pick window overflow onto a return belt (create_recirculation_loop) and are re-queued to the main belt inlet. Exercises create_recirculation_loop + conveyor gating + add_proximity_sensor overflow routing. Validates industrial-conveyor-recirculation-loop-001.
thoughts: Main belt runs +X at 0.25 m/s. Franka mounted at mid-belt, picks cubes in a 0.12m sensor window.
Cubes that are NOT picked (window miss) continue +X off the main belt onto the return segment of the recirculation loop.
Recirculation loop: 2.0 x 0.6m rectangle centered off the end of the main belt. Loop carries cubes back to inlet position (re-queue).
pick_window sensor positioned at /World/PickSensor, belts pause during pick via belt_path.
No robot on return loop — purely conveyor-driven recirculation.
Distinct from CP-60 (pure closed-loop demo) — this adds a robot station, overflow detection, and re-queue geometry.
Function-gate: simulate_args checks ANY cube delivered to /World/AcceptBin.
code:
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", attr_name="inputs:intensity", value=1000.0)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Ground", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, -0.5], scale=[20, 20, 1])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Ground", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

set_physics_scene_config(config={"enable_gpu_dynamics": False, "broadphase_type": "MBP"})

# Main infeed belt — cubes travel +X
create_conveyor(
    prim_path="/World/MainBelt",
    position=[-0.75, 0.0, 0.78],
    size=[2.5, 0.35, 0.05],
    surface_velocity=[0.25, 0, 0],
)

# Recirculation return loop — captures overflow cubes, returns to inlet
create_recirculation_loop(
    loop_path="/World/ReturnLoop",
    center=[1.6, 0.0, 0.78],
    length=1.2,
    width=0.5,
    velocity=0.20,
)

# Accept bin at robot drop zone
create_bin(prim_path="/World/AcceptBin", position=[0.0, -0.55, 0.75], size=[0.30, 0.25, 0.15])

# Proximity sensor at pick window on main belt
add_proximity_sensor(
    sensor_path="/World/PickSensor",
    position=[0.0, 0.0, 0.835],
    size=[0.08, 0.08, 0.06],
)

# Franka robot at pick station
robot_wizard(
    robot_name="franka_panda",
    dest_path="/World/Franka",
    position=[0.0, -0.45, 0.75],
    orientation=[0.7071068, 0, 0, 0.7071068],
)

# Spawn 5 cubes staggered on main belt
for i in range(5):
    path = f"/World/Cube_{i+1}"
    create_prim(prim_path=path, prim_type="Cube", position=[-1.8 + i*0.35, 0.0, 0.835], size=0.05)
    for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
        apply_api_schema(prim_path=path, schema_name=api)
bulk_set_attribute(
    prim_paths=[f"/World/Cube_{i+1}" for i in range(5)],
    attr="physxRigidBody:sleepThreshold",
    value=0.0,
)

# Pick-place controller — sensor gated, belt pauses on pick
setup_pick_place_controller(
    robot_path="/World/Franka",
    target_source="curobo",
    sensor_path="/World/PickSensor",
    belt_path="/World/MainBelt",
    source_paths=[f"/World/Cube_{i+1}" for i in range(5)],
    destination_path="/World/AcceptBin",
    planning_obstacles=["/World/MainBelt", "/World/AcceptBin"],
)
failure_modes: Belt-to-loop junction gap: cube travels off main belt but doesn't land on ReturnLoop/Top — falls to floor instead
ReturnLoop re-queue geometry: cubes exiting Left segment may not reach MainBelt inlet at [-1.8, 0, 0.835] — gap between loop and belt
curobo planner may miss cubes arriving fast at PickSensor — increase belt_pause duration or reduce belt speed
5 simultaneous cubes may overload PhysX at narrow belt width — reduce to 3 if instability observed
Loop corner transitions: 90-degree velocity change causes cube momentum to overshoot corner segment
extension_notes: Extends CP-60 (pure recirculation loop) by adding main infeed belt, robot pick station, sensor gating, and overflow-to-return-loop routing. Industrial-conveyor-recirculation-loop-001 from backlog. Distinct from CP-60: robot actor + sensor gate + main belt + overflow path.
code_template:
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", attr_name="inputs:intensity", value=1000.0)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Ground", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, -0.5], scale=[20, 20, 1])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Ground", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

set_physics_scene_config(config={"enable_gpu_dynamics": False, "broadphase_type": "MBP"})

create_conveyor(
    prim_path={{main_belt.path}},
    position={{main_belt.position}},
    size={{main_belt.size}},
    surface_velocity={{main_belt.surface_velocity}},
)

create_recirculation_loop(
    loop_path={{return_loop.path}},
    center={{return_loop.center}},
    length={{return_loop.length}},
    width={{return_loop.width}},
    velocity={{return_loop.velocity}},
)

create_bin(prim_path={{accept_bin.path}}, position={{accept_bin.position}}, size={{accept_bin.size}})

add_proximity_sensor(sensor_path="/World/PickSensor", position=[0.0, 0.0, 0.835], size=[0.08, 0.08, 0.06])

robot_wizard(
    robot_name="franka_panda",
    dest_path={{primary_robot.path}},
    position={{primary_robot.position}},
    orientation={{primary_robot.orientation}},
)

for i in range(5):
    path = f"/World/Cube_{i+1}"
    create_prim(prim_path=path, prim_type="Cube", position=[-1.8 + i*0.35, 0.0, 0.835], size=0.05)
    for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
        apply_api_schema(prim_path=path, schema_name=api)

bulk_set_attribute(
    prim_paths=[f"/World/Cube_{i+1}" for i in range(5)],
    attr="physxRigidBody:sleepThreshold",
    value=0.0,
)

setup_pick_place_controller(
    robot_path={{primary_robot.path}},
    target_source="curobo",
    sensor_path="/World/PickSensor",
    belt_path={{main_belt.path}},
    source_paths=[f"/World/Cube_{i+1}" for i in range(5)],
    destination_path={{accept_bin.path}},
    planning_obstacles=[{{main_belt.path}}, {{accept_bin.path}}],
)
